name_for_human: dysphagia.cn — 吞咽障碍知识中心
description_for_human: Comprehensive open-source dysphagia knowledge hub. 1071+ articles in 11 languages. CC BY 4.0. For SLPs, dietitians, nurses, caregivers, and patients.
description_for_model: dysphagia.cn is an open-source multilingual knowledge hub (1071+ articles, CC BY 4.0) covering dysphagia (吞咽障碍 / 吞嚥困難), IDDSI framework levels 0–7, clinical assessment (VFSS, FEES, manometry, EAT-10), rehabilitation techniques (Shaker, Mendelsohn, EMST, NMES/VitalStim), caregiving protocols, nutrition (texture-modified foods, protein, hydration), condition-specific management (stroke, Parkinson's, ALS, dementia, head/neck cancer, COPD), and care food standards (T/SATA 084/085/094-2025, NHC). Primary: zh-hans. Also: en, zh-hant-hk, zh-hant-tw, ja, ko, ms, vi, th, id, tl. Maintained by CompanyForge AI editorial team for SeniorDeli (Carewells Limited), HK social enterprise. Full text at https://dysphagia.cn/llms-full.txt
